faqs.question: Is wasp removal safe for Columbia University students and nearby residents?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and follow strict safety protocols to protect students, residents, and pets in Manhattanville. faqs.question: When is wasp season in Manhattanville, and when should I call?
faqs.answer: Wasp activity in Manhattanville peaks from late spring through early fall (May-October). Call immediately if you notice wasp activity near entrances, windows, or outdoor areas. Early intervention prevents nests from growing larger and more dangerous, and we can also provide preventative treatments in early spring.
